audit_findings_resolved.actual: All 5 closed (audit was stale; scoped to genuine gaps). T-04 router-enforced procs tested; service-delegated gap tracked in #420.

test_coverage.actual: 33 page tests (DoD >=20); contact module suite green (281/2 skipped); pre-ship coverage gate PASS

notes: Contact audit finding: T-01,T-04,T-06,T-07,T-08. Audit (2026-03-05) is STALE — page.test.tsx (~783 lines) + contact.router.security.test.ts (22 tenant tests) + EMAIL/CALL/MEETING + opportunities/aiInsight/tickets/documents already exist. Spec (2026-06-13) scopes ONLY the genuine gaps: page activity/notes/tasks/deals tab + loading/not-found + addNote (T-01/T-08); cross-tenant negatives for create/update/delete/addNote/bulkDelete/linkToAccount/unlinkFromAccount/updateEmail (T-04, new contact.router.tenant.test.ts); logActivity NOTE type (T-06); getById populated activities/notes (T-07). Test-only, no source change. CSV status kept In Progress (recognized bucket) for the report invariant; spec/plan phases tracked here + in notes.
